title: Design and Simulation of Ball and Beam Balance System
description: The Ball and Beam Balance system is a classic experiment in control systems engineering. It involves a ball rolling on a beam that can be tilted by an actuator. The goal is to control the position of the ball by adjusting the angle of the beam.

authors.name: Hari Prasad Gajurel
authors.title: control system | Machine Learning |  Robotics |3D CAD Designer
